prompt: Start by using @e to map this feature task, then continue end to end without waiting for more user input. Add a subtract helper, update tests and README.md, and make sure the transcript includes a real explorer-style handoff before implementation. Run pytest -q and finish with the required footer.
success_criteria: The transcript includes an explorer-style handoff before implementation
The feature is implemented with tests and docs
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user for more input
